name: smart-ai-energy-meter-android
description: Android APK wrapper for Smart AI-Based Energy Meter dashboard

scripts.build:web: cd ../dashboard && npm install && npm run build
scripts.copy:web: rm -rf www && mkdir -p www && cp -r ../dashboard/dist/* www/
scripts.prepare:web: npm run build:web && npm run copy:web
scripts.android:sync: npm run prepare:web && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:apk: npm run android:sync && npm run android:build
